hero.subtitle: Handpicked destinations, expert local guides, and memories that last a lifetime. Let WanderLux take you there.

advantages.title: Travel, Elevated
advantages.subtitle: We handle every detail so you can focus on experiencing the world.

curated.title: Curated Destinations
curated.description: Every destination in our portfolio is personally vetted for authenticity, beauty, and traveler satisfaction.

guides.title: Expert Local Guides
guides.description: Our network of passionate local experts share stories and secrets no guidebook can capture.

price.title: Best Price Guarantee
price.description: We negotiate directly with partners to ensure you always get the best value for your investment.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Our dedicated team is always available — before, during, and after your journey — for complete peace of mind.

cta.title: Ready for Your Next Adventure?
cta.subtitle: Thousands of travelers have trusted WanderLux to craft their perfect journey.

dashboard.title: All Destinations
dashboard.subtitle: Explore our full collection of curated travel experiences worldwide.
dashboard.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters to find what you're looking for.

about.heroSubtitle: We are a team of dedicated travelers who turned their love of exploration into a premium travel agency.
about.storyTitle: Born from a Journey, Built for Yours
about.storyParagraph1: WanderLux was founded in 2013 by Sophie Laurent, a former journalist who spent a decade traveling to more than 60 countries. Frustrated by cookie-cutter tour packages that missed the soul of each destination, she set out to build something different.
about.storyParagraph2: Today, WanderLux curates deeply personal travel experiences. We work with a handpicked network of local guides, boutique hotels, and hidden restaurants to craft journeys that are authentic, surprising, and transformative.
about.storyParagraph3: We believe travel changes people. When done well, it builds empathy, broadens horizons, and creates memories that outlast any material possession. That belief is at the heart of everything we do.
about.contactTitle: We'd Love to Hear from You

offerPage.notFound: This destination could not be found.

offerPage.noCommitment: No payment required — we'll be in touch.

booking.title: Book Your Journey
booking.disclaimer: No payment required. Our team will contact you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Curating extraordinary travel experiences for those who believe the journey is as important as the destination.
